name_en: Top-tier original factory, comes with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, comes with full packaging
Cherry Red!!️
Original factory with cashmere lining✔️Classic Lady Diana bag, a must-have three-compartment bag for everyone😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence💃🏻, can be worn crossbody or handheld, very feminine. A classic fashion style. A beautiful bag that many fashion icons and on Instagram have, don't miss out❤️
size:17cm
